rows.title: When the Line Broke
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Elias Vale, Mara Sable, Naia Thorn, Derren Holt, Benn, Lio, guild clerk, three trapped workers, Toma
rows.events: Rowan defies his father, joins an unofficial rescue into South Third, frees Lio, survives a collapse, and becomes trapped below with workers as shardmice mass and a deep bell rings from forbidden depth.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan moves from debt-pressured runner near home to trapped survival leader below the mine with damaged gear, no surface route, and a possible path into old depths.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H05 advanced; H02 mentioned

rows.title: The Hollow Behind Stone
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio, Mett, Toma, Sena, Jeren, Benn, Derren
rows.events: Rowan locates and opens a patched false wall, leads the trapped survivors through a hidden unstable bypass into an abandoned service corridor, and helps rescue a pinned survivor named Jeren before receiving a blue notice that recognizes his actions and names his trait.
rows.stateChanges: The group escapes the collapse pocket into unmapped old workings, Toma is confirmed alive, Benn and Derren remain missing, Jeren joins the survivor cluster badly injured, and Rowan gains first explicit system-facing recognition.
rows.hookActivity: H02 advanced; H01 advanced; survival-determine-toma-fate-and advanced; survival-mystery-discover-what-lies advanced; H03 advanced; H05 mentioned

rows.title: Paper Shields
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio, Mett, Sena, Toma, Jeren, Joren Pike, guild registrar, gray clerk, watchmen, medics, ore-hauler woman, workers
rows.events: Rowan leads the injured survivors back through the old service corridor to a side storage cut, emerges into the sorting yard, refuses to surrender route details to guild officials and Joren Pike, receives a new Ledger notice retaining his provisional recognition, and learns from Lio about provisional qualification screens as the first path to legal standing.
rows.stateChanges: Group exits immediate underground trap; Jeren and Toma are transferred to medics; Rowan’s conflict shifts from physical survival to legal-economic struggle; he adopts a concrete new objective: qualify, get papers, and secure claim rights before Pike acts.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 advanced; H03 advanced; H05 advanced; economic-mystery-determine-whether-the advanced; H08 opened; H09 opened

rows.title: The Price of Being Counted
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio Marr, Toma, Jeren, Sena, Mett (off-scene), Hadrik, registry runner, Benn’s sister, Mistress Corl, Elias Vale, medics, registrar/orderly
rows.events: Rowan wakes in the healing ward, learns the true cost and structure of the provisional screen, is pressured by Hadrik for route details and threatened with review consequences, recruits Sena as a truth-telling witness, fails to reach Jeren, confronts Benn’s family directly, and is summoned inside by his father ahead of the afternoon board.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan moves from broad strategic intent to same-day procedural urgency; fee/bond barriers become concrete; Sena becomes a committed witness; Jeren and Toma are unavailable; Benn’s kin become active participants; Elias enters the on-page conflict.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 mentioned/advanced through bell-memory tie; H03 advanced; H04 advanced; H05 advanced; H08 advanced; H09 advanced; H10 opened; H11 opened
